title: globularia cordifolia subsp. cordifolia
intro: Globularia cordifolia subsp. cordifolia, also known as heartleaf globularia or heart-leaved globe daisy, is a perennial herb in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Globularia cordifolia subsp. cordifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its ability to act as an antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions.
